title: TotalOrderPartitioner
description: The TotalOrderPartitioner class implements a partitioner that effects a total order by reading split points from an externally generated source. The key algorithms or processing patterns visible in this chunk are the building of a trie of the first total.order.partitioner.max.trie.depth(2) + 1 bytes if the keytype is {@link org.apache.hadoop.io.BinaryComparable} and total.order.partitioner.natural.order is not false, and a binary search of the partition keyset using the {@link org.apache.hadoop.io.RawComparator} defined for this job otherwise. The data flowing in and out of this chunk is the input file, which must be sorted with the same comparator and contain {@link Job#getNumReduceTasks()} - 1 keys. The key imported, parent, or collaborator classes visible in this chunk are org.apache.hadoop.classification.InterfaceAudience, org.apache.hadoop.classification.InterfaceStability, org.apache.hadoop.conf.Configurable, org.apache.hadoop.conf.Configuration, org.apache.hadoop.fs.FileSystem, org.apache.hadoop.fs.Path, org.apache.hadoop.io.BinaryComparable, org.apache.hadoop.io.IOUtils, org.apache.hadoop.io.SequenceFile, org.apache.hadoop.io.RawComparator, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.Job, org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.Partitioner, and org.apache.hadoop.util.ReflectionUtils.
